description: Zephyr One regains control after the gravity storm, and Daisy finally establishes radio contact with Mack and Yo-Yo at the Lighthouse. Warm greetings ensue as S.H.I.E.L.D. reunites by radio, cementing the hope that both groups have survived their ordeals and can finally work together to bring down Kasius.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: Mack, Yo-Yo, do you copy? Mack, Yo-Yo, do you copy?
Really? It's like a family heirloom.
That we need in two places at once.
Alphonso Mackenzie, do you copy? Mack, can you hear me? Mack?
Tremors, thank God. You all still in one piece?
More or less. It's good to hear your voice.
Mack, we're on our way to you. Do you have Flint?
Yes, we do. You got a plan?
